product_overview: A lightweight web app that generates cooking recipes from a user-uploaded image of ingredients and a selected culinary style using Google Generative AI. Users upload or drag-and-drop a photo, choose a country/style, and receive a formatted recipe.
core_goals: Enable quick recipe generation from a photo of ingredients using Google Generative AI.
Allow users to specify a culinary style or country to influence recipe output.
Provide a simple, responsive flow with clear success and error states.
Surface retry and validation paths for common user errors and API failures.

features.name: Recipe Generation
features.description: Generate a recipe based on an uploaded image of ingredients and a selected culinary style/country, displaying the result in the main dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click on the upload zone -> Select an image file of ingredients -> See thumbnail preview of uploaded image -> Select a culinary style/country from the dropdown menu -> Click the "Generate Recipe" button -> See loading indicator in result area -> See generated recipe with title, ingredients list, and instructions

Navigate to / -> Drag and drop an image of ingredients onto the upload zone -> See thumbnail preview of uploaded image -> Select a culinary style/country from the dropdown menu -> Click the "Generate Recipe" button -> See loading indicator in result area -> See generated recipe with title, ingredients list, and instructions
Navigate to / -> Click the "Generate Recipe" button without uploading an image -> See validation error requesting an image upload
Navigate to / -> Click on the upload zone -> Select a non-image or oversized file -> See file type/size validation error

Navigate to / -> Click on the upload zone -> Select an image file of ingredients -> Leave culinary style dropdown at default/unselected -> Click the "Generate Recipe" button -> See validation error requesting style selection

Navigate to / -> Click on the upload zone -> Select an image file of ingredients -> Select a culinary style/country from the dropdown menu -> Click the "Generate Recipe" button -> See loading indicator in result area -> Receive API error from generativelanguage endpoint -> See error message with retry option

features.name: Recipe Generation
features.description: Generates a recipe based on an uploaded image (ingredients) and a selected country/style.
user_interactions: Click on the upload zone or drag and drop an image of ingredients
Select a culinary style/country from the dropdown menu
